description: A project manager needs to post a weekly update on a major infrastructure project's public-facing website.

nodes.task_description: Log in to the content management system (CMS) for the project website.
Draft a new post summarizing the week's progress, any new milestones, and upcoming traffic changes.

expected_outcome.value: The manager writes a clear and informative update for the public.

nodes.task_description: Publish the new post to the website.

expected_outcome.value: The manager successfully publishes the update.
